questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Identify the best way to improve the underlined part of the given sentence. If there is no improvement is required, select &#39;No improvement&#39;.</span></p>

<p>Although the&nbsp;food was <u><strong>staled but it smelled deliciously so that</strong></u> no one believed it was cooked yesterday.</p>
options: stale but it smelled&nbsp;delicious so that /
staled but it smelling deliciously so that /
staled but it smelled&nbsp;deliciously so that /

questions.statement:
<p><u style="font-weight: 700;">Direction</u><span style="font-weight: 700;">: Select the correct passive form of the given sentence.</span></p>

<p>All creations of God have to share water, which is a natural resource.&nbsp;</p>
options: Water has to be shared by all creations of God,&nbsp;which is a natural resource.&nbsp; /
Water, which is a natural resource, has to be shared by all creations of God.&nbsp; /
All creations of God have to be shared water, which is a natural resource.&nbsp; /
Water, which is a natural resource, had to be shared by all creations of God.&nbsp; /
Tina asked her son where he was going. He replied that he was going to his friend&rsquo;s house to play. /
Tina asked her son where he was going. He replied that he went to friend&rsquo;s house to play.&nbsp; /
Tina asked her son where he is going. He replied that he is going to his friend&rsquo;s house to play. /
Tina asked her son where he went. Son replied that he went to his friend&rsquo;s house to play. /

questions.statement: ​What should come in the place of blank number (1)?&nbsp;
​What should come in the place of blank number (2)?
​What should come in the place of blank number (3)?
What should come in the place of blank number (4)?&nbsp;
What should come in the place of blank number (5)?&nbsp;
